--- 
title: "Statistics and the Physical World"
author: "Larry Winner"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  pdf_document: default
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
geometry: left=2cm,right=2cm,top=2cm,bottom=2cm
documentclass: book
bibliography:
- book1.bib
- packages.bib
biblio-style: apalike
link-citations: yes 
github-repo: rstudio/bookdown-demo
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
description: This is an Introduction to Statistics with applications from the physical
  world. We will make use of the R programming language for computations.

---


# Preface {-}

These notes are for STA 2170 at the University of Florida. 

```{r, include=FALSE}
options(tinytex.verbose = TRUE)
```
